negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The current port does not require Capability::Llm for image, audio, or video precompile executor validation; it requires ImageCall, AudioCall, and VideoCall respectively.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-precompile-addresses/src/lib.rs maps IMAGE/AUDIO/VIDEO to ImageCall/AudioCall/VideoCall, not Llm.
crates/rpc/rpc/src/async_tx_validator.rs derives the required capability from metadata and rejects mismatches.

notes: This Atlas record conflicts with the newer distinct-capability records in the same batch; the local port implements the newer behavior.
rationale: The validator maps IMAGE_CALL_PRECOMPILE, AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE, and VIDEO_CALL_PRECOMPILE into the Llm capability branch so only executors registered for that capability are accepted. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: RPC executor registration validation must require Capability::Llm for image, audio, and video precompile addresses, the same capability class used for LLM and agent-call precompiles.
suggested_falsification_tests: Validate executor registration for each multimodal precompile against a registry entry with Capability::Llm and one without it; assert only the Llm-capable executor passes under this rule.
summary: Multimodal executor validation no longer uses generic LLM capability.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Validate executor registration for each multimodal precompile against a registry entry with Capability::Llm and one without it; assert only the Llm-capable executor passes under this rule.
title: Multimodal executors require LLM capability
